case_title: ROMITI ROBERT JR. VS RAYNAL JEAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROMITI ROBERT JR. AS TO DEFENDANT RAYNAL JEAN VETERANS TAXICAB CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VETERANS TAXICAB CO.
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO VETERANS TAXICAB, NOT MAILED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMITI ROBERT JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAYNAL JEAN VETERANS TAXICAB CO. $2,500.08 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,508.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RAYNAL JEAN VETERANS TAXICAB CO.
